# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

parameters:
  appNamePrefix: 'myapp' # Unique prefix added so that we don't overwrite an existing application. This can be a name you want, but make sure it is unique across all AAD applications to avoid conflicts later on in the template creation process (it will become globally unique). It has no effect if AppIDAlwaysUse exists and true
  appDisplayName: 'My Application' # Display Name of your application. This could be a name you want, but make sure it is distinct across all AAD applications to avoid conflicts later on in the template creation process (it will become globally unique). It has no effect if AppIDAlwaysUse exists and true
  location: 'West Europe'   # Region where resources are created. This should be replaced by a proper variable when setting up ARM templates or you can use default value instead to save time of manual editing later on in the template creation process (it will become globally unique). It has no effect if AppIDAlwaysUse exists and true
  resourceGroupName: 'myresourcegroup' # Name for your Resource Group. This should be replaced by a proper variable when setting up ARM templates or you can use default value instead to save time of manual editing later on in the template creation process (it will become globally unique). It has no effect if AppIDAlwaysUse exists and true
  roleDefinitionName: 'Contributor' # Name for your Role Definition. This should be replaced by a proper variable when setting up ARM templates or you can use default value instead to save time of manual editing later on in the template creation process (it will become globally unique). It has no effect if AppIDAlwaysUse exists and true
  scope: 'Subscription' # Scope at which Role is being assigned. This should be replaced by a proper variable when setting up ARM templates or you can use default value instead to save time of manual editing later on in the template creation process (it will become globally unique). It has no effect if AppIDAlwaysUse exists and true
  displayName: 'My Role Definition' # Display name for your role definition. This should be replaced by a proper variable when setting up ARM templates or you can use default value instead to save time of manual editing later on in the template creation process (it will become globally unique). It has no effect if AppIDAlwaysUse exists and true
  description: 'Role Definition for CI/CD pipeline' # Description of your role definition. This should be replaced by a proper variable when setting up ARM templates or you can use default value instead to save time of manual editing later on in the template creation process (it will become globally unique). It has no effect if AppIDAlwaysUse exists and true
